---
title: "About"
page-layout: article
---

```{=html}
<div class="hero">
  <div class="hero-photo">
    <!-- Replace 'photo.jpg' with your actual photo -->
    <img src="photo.jpg" alt="Bladimir Padilla" 
         onerror="this.style.display='none'">
  </div>
  <div class="hero-text">
    <h1>Bladimir Padilla</h1>
    <p class="subtitle">Graduate Student · [Department Name] · [University Name]</p>
    <p>
      Welcome! I am a graduate student in [field], broadly interested in 
      [your research interests]. My work sits at the intersection of 
      [theme A] and [theme B], with a particular focus on [specific area].
    </p>
    <p>
      Before graduate school, I [brief background — e.g., worked at / studied at / 
      was based in]. I am currently working on [current project or dissertation chapter].
    </p>
  </div>
</div>
```

::: {.section-title}
Research Interests
:::

[Interest 1] · [Interest 2] · [Interest 3] · [Interest 4]

::: {.section-title}
News & Updates
:::

**[Month Year]** — [Update, e.g., paper accepted, conference presentation, fellowship awarded]

**[Month Year]** — [Update]

**[Month Year]** — [Update]
